---
title: "Scientific Board"
listing:
  - id: current-scientific-board
    contents: 
      - people
    template: listings/active-scientific-board-listing.ejs
    sort: "surname asc"
  - id: alumni-scientific-board
    contents:
      - people
    template: listings/alumni-scientific-board-listing.ejs
    sort: "surname asc"

---
The OSC is steered by an interdisciplinary scientific board elected every two years by the members of the OSC during a general assembly.

## Current Scientific Board

::: {#current-scientific-board}
:::


## Former Scientific Board Members


::: {#alumni-scientific-board}
:::
